hooks.command: printf '### OPERATING LOOP active (AGENTS.md)\nRun atlas reality --json before state claims. STRUCTURE = GRAPH FIRST: para entender quien importa que, blast radius, churn o dependencias, consulta el grafo vivo via tronco MCP (trunk_invoke_readonly: graph_importers, graph_blast_radius, graph_imports_of, graph_churn, graph_overview) ANTES de leer ficheros o docs — los .md son pasado/futuro, el grafo es el presente (se regenera solo en cada commit). Read WORK_LEDGER.md for live status and docs/design/atlas_ecosystem_map.md for ecosystem classification. Do not inject the full ledger into context unless explicitly auditing it.\n'
